'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 13''' was published in October [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The Shooting of ''[[Star Wars]]'' Part Two—On the Floor", by [[Jon Trux]]: a followup to "[[John Dykstra]]—Making Movie Magic" in [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 12|the previous issue]], discussing cameramen [[Richard Edlund]] and [[Dennis Muren]]'s filming of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] sequences.
*"[[Harrison Ellenshaw|P. S. Ellenshaw]] and the Magic of Matte", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an article on P. S. Ellenshaw's [[Wikipedia: Matte (filmmaking)|matte paintings]] for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original film]].
*"The Model Squad", by [[John May]]: an article on the model makers of [[Industrial Light & Magic]].

==Media==
===Poster gallery===
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
